query:
ALTER TABLE consultations 
ADD COLUMN aiAudioUrl VARCHAR(500),
ADD COLUMN aiSlideDeckUrl VARCHAR(500),
ADD COLUMN aiMindMapUrl VARCHAR(500),
ADD COLUMN aiProcessingAttempts INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
ADD COLUMN aiLastProcessedAt TIMESTAMP,
ADD COLUMN specialistApprovalStatus ENUM('pending_review', 'approved', 'rejected', 'needs_deep_analysis') DEFAULT 'pending_review',
ADD COLUMN specialistRejectionReason TEXT;

ADD COLUMN specialistApprovalStatus ENUM('pending_review', 'approved', 'rejected', 'needs_deep_analysis') DEFAULT 'pending_review',
ADD COLUMN specialistRejectionReason TEXT;
